# Add a Device Directory entry

Please fill out the following information as part of your board submission.

|Field| Input|
|:-----------|-------:|
|Company Name|todo|
|Board name| todo |
|Board Website| todo|
|RISC-V Profile| `RVI20,RVA23,RVB23,...unknown/none`|
|Owner for Updates| email address|
|Description (1 sentence)| todo|

Please keep in mind the audience is technical developers, so avoid too much extra marketing fluff.


## Agreements
Please acknowledge that you are submitting this information in good faith and not on behalf of any restricted entities.

`Yes / No` : `Your Name Here`

Please acknowledge that this information may be changed by the RISC-V organization. If you do not keep the information up to date the RISC-V International organization reserves the right to remove the listings to keep the directory up to date and relevant. 

`Yes / No` : `Your Name Here`

Note: the website URL will be periodically scanned, an invalid product URL will be considered as a product no longer being relevant and may be grounds for device removal from the directory.
